Index.title: Aga & Rodrigo
Index.subtitle: We are getting married!
Index.description: Welcome to our wedding website. We are so happy to share this special day with you.

Nav.dictTagline: Love speaks many languages, and we want to help you with ours.
Nav.dictDesc: We’ve prepared a special guide with essential phrases in Polish, Spanish, and English to help you connect with our global family.
Nav.dictFooter: Compiled with love for our global family

OurStory.title: Our Story
OurStory.subtitle: The Journey Together
OurStory.event1_desc: Thanks to the most popular Latino bar (that Aga lived above) and the most popular Latino known in the city (now a common friend), we met each other on the street in front of a karaoke bar (Oh, irony! We both don't like karaoke bars).
OurStory.event2_desc: After many attempts, a few fails, and some late-night dog tantrums, we finally made it to a "friendly drink" that eventually caused Aga to miss a few night buses, staying until closing time, and becoming what is now officially called the "First Date".
OurStory.event3_desc: Fun fact: we both celebrate our birthdays in January. That year, Aga bought tickets to Tenerife for hers. Rodrigo analyzed the situation and decided that instead of going to Vietnam for his birthday, he would join Aga. A 6-hour flight just to stay 48 hours for HER birthday celebration—it melted her heart the moment she realized.
OurStory.event4_desc: A random talk about a music band ended with tickets for the concert in Porto and driving there together in a wannabe campervan with Mucha. 7 countries in 15 days. It was an interesting character test which brought us closer and more comfortable in each other’s company.
OurStory.event5_desc: After the road trip, living for 2 weeks in a small can, we did not know how to live in separate rooms. Now what? Let's move in together. We found a beautiful place for us.
OurStory.event6_desc: Aga surprised Rodrigo by making puzzles with a hidden message 'Will you make me Mrs Garcia and travel through life together?'.
OurStory.event7_desc: The funny story... not for everybody. Rodrigo made a video that he wanted to show before the proposal, but someone was digging into his phone and found the video, the very same morning that the proposal was about to happen. Aga's version: I just wanted to see the photos from the day before. How would I know that this photo video compilation will finish with 'Will you marry me?'?!
OurStory.event8_desc: The perfect opportunity to learn even more about Rodrigo came with the wedding invitation in Bogota. Thanks to that, Aga got to meet very important people in Rodri's life and see some wonderful places. But that's just the beginning...
OurStory.footer: ...and the best is yet to come!

RSVP.title: RSVP
RSVP.searchPlaceholder: Search your name on the guest list...
RSVP.nameHelper: Please use the name exactly as written on your invitation
RSVP.songLabel: What song will get you on the dance floor?
RSVP.notFound: Name not found. Please try again or contact us.

Accommodation.title: Accommodation
Accommodation.venueFeatures: This is where the magic happens! The entire celebration takes place in this historic palace.
Accommodation.campingText: We have limited spots for camping on house garden for those who want to stay close to nature and make the stay budget friendly.
Accommodation.logisticsNote: Transportation will be provided from selected points to the venue and back. Check the Transportation page for schedules!
Accommodation.campingModalDesc: Enter your details below to request a camping spot in the house garden.
Accommodation.campingSuccess: Request sent! We'll be in touch.
Accommodation.venueNoteText: There is an opportunity to reserve a few rooms for a wedding night. The prices balance between 110PLN - 150PLN (approximately 30USD/25EUR - 40USD/35EUR). If you’d like us to reserve the room for you, please let us know as there is a limited availability.
Accommodation.apartmentsText: We did some research and there is an option of renting shared apartments for 90 PLN per person (if they will be accommodated in full). They are in the city center on the streets Drzewna and Kupiecka. If you would be interested in this solution, please mark it in the poll.

Transportation.title: How to get there?
Transportation.gatewaysSubtitle: International airports with driving times to the venue
Transportation.domesticTitle: Domestic Flight: Warsaw to Zielona Góra
Transportation.warsawNote: For those traveling from Chopin Warsaw Airport (WAW), there are 2 daily flights directly to Zielona Góra-Babimost (IEG). This local airport is only 34 km from the city center.
Transportation.iegDistance: Babimost Airport (IEG) is just 34 km from the city center.
Transportation.railInstructions: Check connections from POZ, WRO, BER, or DRS directly to Zielona Góra Główna.

Details.title: Details
Details.event1_desc: Meet up with a surprise in Cafe Noir, Zielona Góra so you could get to know each other.
Details.event2_desc: The ceremony starts at 16:00 in front of Pałac Bogaczów. The transport from Zielona Góra will be provided to you, but more information will be shared with you later. Celebration will last until 3:00 am.
Details.event3_desc: A farewell brunch in a form of a grill on Aga’s garden.
Details.comfortText: Since the palace is surrounded by a park where the event will take place, and the ground outside the dancefloor can be uneven, we highly recommend bringing comfortable shoes so you can dance and explore safely! Also, you might consider some long sleeves just in case it gets chilly in the evening.
Details.kidsText: We adore kids, but we have decided to make this wedding adults-only, so we can all relax, ditch the regular responsibilities and celebrate without worry.
Details.giftsText: We are thrilled that you are joining us for our special day. Your presence is an amazing gift. However, if you would like to contribute to the start of our new journey together, we would be truly grateful.

Poll.title: Poll
Poll.subtitle: Help us make the party unforgettable!
Poll.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {name}! Please share your preferences with us.
Poll.dietaryDesc: Do you have any allergies or dietary restrictions? (Optional)
Poll.alcoholFunText: Help us stock the bar! Whether you prefer a Polish toast or a Latin mix, we've got you covered.
Poll.accommodationLabel: Which accommodation are you interested in?
Poll.accommodationOption3: Let's go with camping! (As long there is a shower! 😀🛟)
Poll.stayLabel: Would you like to rent a room at the wedding venue on the wedding night (26/08/26) or you are fine with going back to the city after the celebration?
Poll.stayOption1: I would take a room at the venue!
Poll.stayOption2: I will be ok with going back to my stay in the city!
Poll.successMessage: Thank you! Your preferences help us plan an amazing celebration.
